name: io.github.mhaggis/security-detections-mcp
description: Aggregates security detection rules from Sigma, Splunk ESCU, Elastic, and KQL into a unified searchable SQLite database with MITRE ATT&CK mappings, CVE tracking, coverage analysis, and detection engineering intelligence for security analysts and threat hunters.
title: Security Detections

environmentVariables.name: SIGMA_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to Sigma rule directories (e.g., /path/to/sigma/rules,/path/to/sigma/rules-threat-hunting)

environmentVariables.name: SPLUNK_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to Splunk ESCU detection directories (e.g., /path/to/security_content/detections)

environmentVariables.name: ELASTIC_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to Elastic detection rule directories (e.g., /path/to/detection-rules/rules)

environmentVariables.name: KQL_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to KQL hunting query directories (e.g., /path/to/kql-queries)

environmentVariables.name: SUBLIME_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to Sublime Security rule directories (e.g., /path/to/sublime-rules/detection-rules)

environmentVariables.name: CQL_HUB_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to CQL Hub (CrowdStrike) query directories (e.g., /path/to/cql-hub/queries)

environmentVariables.name: JAMF_PROTECT_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to Jamf Protect custom analytic detection directories (macOS, e.g., /path/to/jamfprotect/custom_analytic_detections)

environmentVariables.name: STORY_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to Splunk analytic story directories (optional, e.g., /path/to/security_content/stories)
